column1: Store name as per Uber Eats manager
column2: External store ID as per Uber Eats manager
column3: Order ID as per Uber Eats manager
column4: Unique ID to identify the order
column5: The mode of order fulfillment whether it was delivery by courier via Uber network, delivery by merchant, Pick-up by customer or Dine-in
column6: Mode of payment used for order payment
column7: The platform from which the customer ordered, (i.e. iOS, Android, Uber Eats Web)
column8: Either: Completed (eater received food), Cancelled (order cancelled by eater or support), Refund (eater was refunded for order), or Unfulfilled (order was not able to be completed)
column9: Local date the order was placed, or local date of the original order placed for which there is a refund
column10: Local timestamp for when order was accepted by the merchant
column11: Uber membership status of the customer who placed the order
column13: Tax on total item sales in the order
column15: Amount merchants are responsible for refunding customers when they report order errors (excl tax)
column17: Amount merchants are responsible for refunding customers when they report order errors (incl tax)
column18: Adjustments merchants made to the price of items once an order has been placed (excl tax)
column20: Merchant promotions applied to the order
column21: Tax on merchant promotions applied to the order
column22: Merchant promotions applied to the delivery fee charged to Eaters
column23: Tax on merchant promotions applied to the delivery fee charged to Eaters
column25: Fee charged to eater by the merchant for the packaging material
column26: Amount merchant charges Uber for co-funded marketing campaigns. Varies depending on co-funding % for the campaign.
column27: Total item sales including promotions, adjustments and bag fee incl tax where applicable
column28: The fee Uber charges to merchant to make their store visible to potential customers, provide support and other related services ( %fee is applied to sub-total before discounts)
column29: The % Marketplace fee Uber charges merchant
column30: Tax on Marketplace fee charged to merchant by Uber
column31: Fixed Fee charged to merchant by Uber for using Ubers delivery network
column32: Tax on delivery network fee charged to merchant by Uber
column33: A flat % fee on the basket charged by Uber to merchants for processing every order
column34: Where delivery fee is greater than cost of delivery, this is equal to (delivery fee minus the cost of delivery) where applicable
column35: Tax on service fee charged by merchants to eaters
column36: For merchants who perform their own delivery, the tip from the Eater to the courier
column37: Amount directed to Merchant Capital payments
column38: This is the amount collected for the container deposit fee set in the catalog/menu
column39: Description of adhoc one-time payments or charges from Uber to the merchant
column40: All miscellaneous payments like Ad payments, Ad credits etc. inclusive of tax
column41: Tax Adjustment on Marketplace Facilitator Tax for this order
column42: Sales tax Uber Eats is required to pay in jurisdictions with marketplace facilitator laws
column43: As required by the IRS, a % withheld from payments if the EIN/TIN is missing or does not match IRS records.
column44: Total payout associated with this order (negative if associated with a refund)  Sales + Adjustments - promotions + marketing adjustment + Bag fee + delivery fee (self delivery) + tips (self-delivery) - marketplace fee +/- Other payments - marketplace facilitator tax  (incl tax where applicable)
column45: Date payout initiated by Uber (generally the Monday following the prior week)
column46: Amount commercially agreed to between Merchant and Uber added on a per item basis and charged to the Eater on Merchant’s behalf
column47: Applicable taxes due on the Markup Amount
column48: This is the ID from retailers, used to identify retailer loyalty customers
column49: The reference ID for identifying the payout related to this order in the Payout Summary Report CSV
